Bosnia and Herzegovina 2022 Presidency Results

Switch between a winner-by-district map and a candidate gradient view where color intensity shows how strongly each district voted for the selected candidate.

Vs entity average

Display Mode

Winner map: each district is colored by the candidate who finished first there.

How To Read

This view uses official CIK BiH Presidency municipality results. Brcko district is aggregated into a single map unit.

Hover Over A Unit

The side panel will show the winning candidate and the full candidate vote totals for that election unit.
